# services.interception-tools

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.interception-tools`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.interception-tools.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the interception tools service. |
| `services.interception-tools.plugins` | `list of package` | A list of interception tools plugins that will be made available to use inside the udevmon configuration. |
| `services.interception-tools.udevmonConfig` | `string or absolute path` | String of udevmon YAML configuration, or path to a udevmon YAML configuration file. |
